verdict: Great rhythmic accuracy and song representation, but features overly complex stream flows and hold coordination for an Easy chart.

issues.problem: Features active holds where the player must perform an 8th-note tap (46.494 tap R, 50.813 tap L) while holding another panel. This coordination is too advanced for an Easy difficulty.
A 6-note 8th-note stream (U-D-R-L-U-D) that forces awkward double-stepping or complex crossovers, which are highly uncomfortable and inappropriate for beginner players.
A 7-note 8th-note stream (D-U-R-L-D-U-R) that has very poor foot flow, requiring heavy double-stepping or double crossovers to execute.
